verdict.description: The verdict of the risk assessment.

reason.description: A human-readable reason for the verdict.

attempt_id.description: Unique identifier of the authentication attempt.

control.description: The Radar control that triggered the verdict. Only present if the verdict is `block` or `challenge`.

blocklist_type.description: The type of blocklist entry that triggered the verdict. Only present if the control is `restriction`.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
